scripts.build: pnpm run build:user && pnpm run build:admin && node scripts/assemble-dist.mjs
scripts.db:local: pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.db:remote: pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && pnpm run db:remote && pnpm exec wrangler deploy
